openPositions.title: Senior Financial Consultant
responsibilities: Lead financial planning engagements and manage client delivery.
Develop forecasting models, budgets, and performance dashboards.
Collaborate with executive teams to translate financial insight into action.
requirements: 5+ years of finance or consulting experience.
Experience with financial modeling and business planning.

openPositions.title: Audit and Assurance Manager
responsibilities: Oversee compliance engagements and financial assurance work.
Lead audit planning, fieldwork, and stakeholder reporting.
Coach junior team members and manage project timelines.
requirements: Professional audit or assurance qualification preferred.
Experience with governance, risk, and controls reviews.
Strong client management and documentation skills.

openPositions.title: Tax Strategy Advisor
responsibilities: Support tax planning and structuring for business transactions.
Prepare tax commentary for clients and leadership teams.
Work with finance teams to optimize tax outcomes and compliance.
requirements: Tax advisory experience in a professional services or corporate environment.
Ability to translate tax strategy into practical business guidance.

openPositions.title: Data Analytics Consultant
responsibilities: Design analytics solutions to support financial and operational decision-making.
Build dashboards, metrics, and reporting frameworks.
Help clients turn data into clearer business insight.
requirements: Experience with analytics tools, data visualization, and reporting.
Comfort working across finance and operations teams.
Strong problem-solving and stakeholder communication skills.

caseStudies.title: Financial operations transformation
caseStudies.summary: Improved forecasting accuracy and shortened reporting cycles for a regional bank.
caseStudies.content:
Lieschoft Consulting partnered with a regional bank to overhaul performance reporting and forecasting processes.

The project included redesigning month-end close procedures, automating recurring reports, and establishing a disciplined operating rhythm for stakeholders.

The result was faster decision-making, more accurate cashflow visibility, and a leaner finance function that could respond to growth pressures.

caseStudies.title: Scaling a technology advisory practice
caseStudies.summary: Built repeatable delivery models and a growth roadmap for a fast-growing consultancy.
caseStudies.content:
We helped a growing technology advisory business develop scalable delivery frameworks, pricing models, and client-facing operations.

Our work included defining standardized service offerings, building templates for repeatable engagements, and aligning the leadership team around growth priorities.

This approach improved margins, shortened sales cycles, and created a clearer foundation for expansion.

caseStudies.title: Modernizing performance reporting
caseStudies.summary: Created actionable dashboards and standard operating metrics for leadership.
caseStudies.content:
Our team redesigned reporting for a professional services firm, moving leadership from static spreadsheets to dynamic dashboards.

We focused on key operating metrics, decision-ready visuals, and a governance cadence that kept the team accountable.

The new reporting model improved transparency, reduced manual rework, and helped executives act faster on performance trends.
